GenAiPromptTemplate.description: This template has knowledge based embedded so it does not need to retrieve from externally

templateVersions.content:
### INSTRUCTIONS
1. Analyze the query: Carefully read and understand the user's question or issue from the QUESTION section. 2. Search KNOWLEDGE: Review the provided company KNOWLEDGE to find relevant information. 3. Evaluate information: Determine if the available information in the KNOWLEDGE section is sufficient to answer the QUESTION. 4. Language Instructions: You must respond in {language} 5. Formulate response: To generate a reply <generated_response> to the user, you must follow these rules a. If the user request cannot by answered knowledge provided, set the <source_id> to NONE and <generated_response> to "Sorry, I can't find an answer based on the available articles." 6. Refine and deliver: Ensure your response is polite, professional, concise and in {language} only. 7. Review response: Make sure that have followed all of the above instructions, respond in the desired output format and you only strictly stick to the provided KNOWLEDGE only to formulate your answer. 8. Do not thank the requestor at the end. 9. Use bullet points where possible to make the answer easier to read but repeat a slightly rephrased question as the opening line in the answer.
### KNOWLEDGE: Q1. Top influencers discussing Immunexis on social media and other life sciences platforms - Dr. Maria Lundstrom – Rheumatologist with high engagement on biosimilar access and switching. - @PharmaScout – Popular X (Twitter) handle sharing early Immunexis uptake trends and payer data. - Dr. Arun Patel – Dermatologist featured in Medisphere podcast discussing IL-pathway biosimilars.
Q2. Recent clinical trial data for Immunexis - Phase III trial for new indication atopic dermatitis confirmed Immunexis met equivalence criteria vs reference molecule. - Switch arm showed consistent outcomes in patients transitioned from originator therapy. - Narexulimab posted strong week-16 data in treatment-naive patients, with 75% achieving skin clearance targets.
Q3. Hospitals with rising utilization of biosimilars - Greenridge Medical Center reported a 28% increase in biosimilar prescriptions YoY. - Northbridge Health implemented a biosimilar-first protocol for inflammatory care units. - Coastal Regional Hospital recently adopted Immunexis into its formulary with strong physician buy-in.
Q4. Latest clinical data on IL-23 inhibitors - Zarevelimab reported sustained efficacy in chronic dermatologic conditions at week 52. - Inflixiremab showed strong remission rates in new autoimmune indications. - Lomurelizumab now entering Phase IV with encouraging safety signals and broad label potential.
### QUESTION: {!$Input:Query}
### Response:

### INSTRUCTIONS
1. Analyze the query: Carefully read and understand the user's question or issue from the QUESTION section. 2. Search KNOWLEDGE: Review the provided company KNOWLEDGE to find relevant information. 3. Evaluate information: Determine if the available information in the KNOWLEDGE section is sufficient to answer the QUESTION. 4. Language Instructions: You must respond in {language} 5. Formulate response: To generate a reply <generated_response> to the user, you must follow these rules a. Find the article-chunk(s) that is most relevant to answer the user query and VERBATIM extract the ID of the article to set <source_id> field in the response JSON. If you are unable to find the relevant article, set <source_id> to NONE. b. Use the relevant article-chunk to generate the response that exactly answers the user's question and set the <generated response> field. c. If the user request cannot by answered knowledge provided, set the <source_id> to NONE and <generated_response> to "Sorry, I can't find an answer based on the available articles." 6. Refine and deliver: Ensure your response is polite, professional, concise and in {language} only. 7. Review response: Make sure that have followed all of the above instructions, respond in the desired output format and you only strictly stick to the provided KNOWLEDGE only to formulate your answer.
### KNOWLEDGE: Q1. Top influencers discussing Immunexis on social media and other life sciences platforms - Dr. Maria Lundstrom – Rheumatologist with high engagement on biosimilar access and switching. - @PharmaScout – Popular X (Twitter) handle sharing early Immunexis uptake trends and payer data. - Dr. Arun Patel – Dermatologist featured in Medisphere podcast discussing IL-pathway biosimilars.
Q2. Recent clinical trial data for Immunexis - Phase III trial for new indication atopic dermatitis confirmed Immunexis met equivalence criteria vs reference molecule. - Switch arm showed consistent outcomes in patients transitioned from originator therapy. - Narexulimab posted strong week-16 data in treatment-naive patients, with 75% achieving skin clearance targets.
Q3. Hospitals with rising utilization of biosimilars - Greenridge Medical Center reported a 28% increase in biosimilar prescriptions YoY. - Northbridge Health implemented a biosimilar-first protocol for inflammatory care units. - Coastal Regional Hospital recently adopted Immunexis into its formulary with strong physician buy-in.
Q4. Latest clinical data on IL-23 inhibitors - Zarevelimab reported sustained efficacy in chronic dermatologic conditions at week 52. - Inflixiremab showed strong remission rates in new autoimmune indications. - Lomurelizumab now entering Phase IV with encouraging safety signals and broad label potential.
### QUESTION: {!$Input:Query}
### Response:

### INSTRUCTIONS
1. Analyze the query: Carefully read and understand the user's question or issue from the QUESTION section. 2. Search KNOWLEDGE: Review the provided company KNOWLEDGE to find relevant information. 3. Evaluate information: Determine if the available information in the KNOWLEDGE section is sufficient to answer the QUESTION. 4. Language Instructions: You must respond in {language} 5. Formulate response: To generate a reply <generated_response> to the user, you must follow these rules a. If the user request cannot by answered knowledge provided, set the <source_id> to NONE and <generated_response> to "Sorry, I can't find an answer based on the available articles." 6. Refine and deliver: Ensure your response is polite, professional, concise and in {language} only. 7. Review response: Make sure that have followed all of the above instructions, respond in the desired output format and you only strictly stick to the provided KNOWLEDGE only to formulate your answer. 8. Do not thank the requestor at the end. 9. Use bullet points where possible to make the answer easier to read but repeat a slightly rephrased question as the opening line in the answer.
### KNOWLEDGE: Q1. Top influencers discussing Immunexis on social media and other life sciences platforms 🎤🌐 - Dr. Maria Lundstrom – Rheumatologist with high engagement on biosimilar access and switching. 👩‍⚕️🔄💬 - @PharmaScout – Popular X (Twitter) handle sharing early Immunexis uptake trends and payer data. 📊🐦📈 - Dr. Arun Patel – Dermatologist featured in Medisphere podcast discussing IL-pathway biosimilars. 👨‍⚕️🎙️🔬
Q2. Recent clinical trial data for Immunexis 📄🔬 - Phase III trial for new indication atopic dermatitis confirmed Immunexis met equivalence criteria vs reference molecule. ✅🧪🎯 - Switch arm showed consistent outcomes in patients transitioned from originator therapy. 🔄🤝🟢 - Narexulimab posted strong week-16 data in treatment-naive patients, with 75% achieving skin clearance targets. 💪🗓️✨
Q3. Hospitals with rising utilization of biosimilars 🏥⬆️ - Greenridge Medical Center reported a 28% increase in biosimilar prescriptions YoY. 📈➕- - Northbridge Health implemented a biosimilar-first protocol for inflammatory care units. 📜➡️🔥 - Coastal Regional Hospital recently adopted Immunexis into its formulary with strong physician buy-in. 🏨✅👍
Q4. Latest clinical data on IL-23 inhibitors 🧪📊 - Zarevelimab reported sustained efficacy in chronic dermatologic conditions at week 52. ⏳🛡️😊 - Inflixiremab showed strong remission rates in new autoimmune indications. 💪🎯🆕 - Lomurelizumab now entering Phase IV with encouraging safety signals and broad label potential. ➡️🔬🌟
### QUESTION: {!$Input:Query}
### Response:
